subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified beyond the mention of all created things, befitteth and beseemeth the Best-Beloved, Who through His Name, the Self-Subsisting, hath unsealed the choice Wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر کائنات محبوبی را لایق و سزا که باسم قیوم ختم از رحیق مختوم
